subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who awaketh freed from vain imaginings and ariseth to serve mankind, for he, verily, is among those who behold this Vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن اصبح فارغا عن الاوهام و قائما لخدمه الانام انه من اهل هذا المنظر
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
